goal: Build an AMR pickup-handoff station: Nova Carter docks at cell, Franka picks cube and places in onboard bin on AMR, AMR departs. Realizes Phase 8 yrkesroll #3 (logistics persona — autonomous mobile robot integration).
thoughts: Nova Carter via create_wheeled_robot. Carter has flat top platform — onboard bin sits on platform.
Sequence: AMR starts at staging area → navigates to dock → Franka picks cube → places in AMR bin → AMR navigates to outbound area.
navigate_to is the AMR move handler. Without robust AMR controller, AMR may not reach exact dock pose.
Function-gate: cube delivered to AMR's onboard bin (relative-anchored bin so it moves with AMR). Final position relative to bin frame matters more than world frame.
Simplification: AMR fixed at dock for this canonical (no driving). Tests pickup-onto-AMR pattern only.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[1.5, 0.3, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.15, 0, 0],
)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/Cube_1"], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", material_name="rubber")

create_wheeled_robot(
    robot_path="/World/Carter",
    position=[0.6, -0.5, 0.10],
    drive_type="differential",
    wheel_radius=0.14,
    wheel_base=0.5)

create_bin(prim_path="/World/AmrBin", position=[0.6, -0.5, 0.75], size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.10])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    destination_path="/World/AmrBin",
    drop_target=[0.6, -0.5, 0.82],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt"],
)
extension_notes: Logistics persona: autonomous mobile robot pickup. Carter fixed at dock for V0 (no driving). Future expansion: navigate_to before pickup, navigate_to after placement.
failure_modes: create_wheeled_robot may not support nova_carter — fallback to placeholder Cube as AMR base
AMR bin attached as child of Carter — Franka's drop_target world coord shifts if Carter moves; for V0 with Carter fixed this is OK
Carter as planning obstacle may cause cuRobo to refuse plan (Carter is large)
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-10; build ✓ 20/20 with create_wheeled_robot+navigate_to fixed; gate stable_fail (controller plans 30x but cube never picked)
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpiece.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpiece.position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpiece.path}}, schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[{{workpiece.path}}], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpiece.path}}, material_name="rubber")

create_wheeled_robot(
    robot_path={{amr.path}},
    position={{amr.position}},
    drive_type={{amr.drive_type}},
    wheel_radius={{amr.wheel_radius}},
    wheel_base={{amr.wheel_base}})

create_bin(prim_path={{amr_bin.path}}, position={{amr_bin.position}}, size={{amr_bin.size}})

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpiece.path}}],
    destination_path={{amr_bin.path}},
    drop_target={{amr_bin.drop_target}},
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}],
)
